text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon, I see you are deeply troubled!
Tell this genius what troubles you!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, I am not troubled.
I was simply running a simulation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My classmates have deemed my actions
to be "too much." So I am calculating
how to fix that.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hm?! "Too much"?! And you're quite sure
that's what they said?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It seems their assessment is based on
my training load and my everyday behavior.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then there's no problem at all!
People tell me I'm too much all the time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: This just means you're a genius… just like me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! So wear that "too much" label
with pride! It is proof of your greatness!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
…Accessing data storage. Reclassifying
"too much" as a compliment. Thank you
for your help.
